metadata.description: Developer-experience extras for Claude Code: spoken notifications, an enriched statusline, a protected-branch guard, a dangerous-command guard, an RTK token-optimizer hook, an end-of-session finaliser, a per-project tool scoper, and a Codex-MCP web-research helper.

plugins.name: voice-notify
plugins.description: Spoken macOS notifications (via `say`) when Claude needs your attention or finishes a turn. Natural, varied first-person phrasing routed by context; quiet on quick turns; configurable voice.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Enriched two-line statusline: user@host, cwd, branch/worktree, task focus, model, effort, context and rate-limit usage.

plugins.name: git-guard
plugins.description: Block accidental commits, merges and pushes to protected branches (main/master) before they run. Configurable protected branches; optional block-all-push mode.

plugins.name: shell-guard
plugins.description: Block a small set of catastrophic shell commands (rm -rf / or ~, dd/redirect to a disk, mkfs, fork bombs, curl|sh, chmod 777, eval, sudo, reboot/shutdown) before they run. Catches plain-form accidents; fail-open, configurable.

plugins.name: rtk-hook
plugins.description: Wire the RTK (Rust Token Killer) token-optimizer as a managed PreToolUse hook on the Bash tool, with a /rtk-hook control panel to pause/resume it. No-ops gracefully when rtk isn't installed.

plugins.name: session-finalise
plugins.description: End-of-session housekeeping: an auto-activating checklist (durable memory, handoff, tracker updates, commit/stash, cleanup) plus a /session-finalise command, confirming every irreversible step.

plugins.name: project-scope
plugins.description: Scope a project's plugins, MCP servers and skills to a stated theme — consented project-scope install/uninstall plus a leaner .claude/settings.json (skill overrides, denied MCPs, context budget). Auto-activating skill plus a /project-scope command.

plugins.name: gpt-search
plugins.description: Deep web research from a Claude Code session via the Codex MCP, with project-local cache reuse. Auto-activating skill plus a /gpt-search command. Brings your own Codex MCP; ships no .mcp.json.
